D) BSE and CJD cause in human
151. Prions are- (Pg. 27, E)
A) Smaller than virus
B) Larger than virus
C) Smaller than viroid
D) Similar in size to viruses
152. Choose the incorrect about BSE
(Pg. 27, E)
A) It expanded as Bovine spongiform
encephalophathy
B) Caused by prion
C) Its analogous variant is CJD
D) Its homologous variant is CJD
153. Lichen are — (Pg. 27, E)
A) Saprotroph only
B) Symbiotic
C) Parasitic only
D) A&C
154. Lichen are mutual association of-
(Pg. 27, E)
A) Mycobiont (fungal) and
phycobiont (algae)
